rows.label: qev087507_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well, I'll be damned. Didn't think
you'd solve both problems THAT fast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087507_MSG0007
rows.name:
You're your parents'
daughter for sure, Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087507_MSG0009
rows.name:
It's true they were both
engineering geniuses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087507_MSG0010
rows.name:
But they were beloved by people
for their fire and initiative
more than their theories.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087507_MSG0011
rows.name:
They were heroes for
folks in my generation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087507_MSG0012
rows.name:
Can't help but think how much
further along NLA'd be if
they were still with us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087507_MSG0013
rows.name: I'm happy to hear you say that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087507_MSG0014
rows.name:
But that job falls on all of us
living here now, Commander.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087507_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm nowhere near their level yet, but
I promise I'll keep doing my best![ST:wait ]
